[https://github.com/continuous-delphi/delphi-coverage](https://github.com/continuous-delphi/delphi-coverage)

**Tag:** `vX.Y.Z`

**Direct download:** [delphi-coverage.ps1](https://github.com/continuous-delphi/delphi-coverage/releases/download/vX.Y.Z/delphi-coverage.ps1)

This release improves `delphi-coverage`, a `Continuous-Delphi` utility that wraps
Delphi code coverage engines (DelphiCodeCoverage, radCodeCoverage) behind a unified
PowerShell interface with structured output, threshold enforcement, and badge generation.
